_publications._publicationTitle: A clinically and genomically annotated nerve sheath tumor biospecimen repository

details: Patient 2-023 MPNST tumor tissue clinically and genomically characterized in the Johns Hopkins NF1 biospecimen repository; NF1 diagnosis age 11–20 years, plexiform neurofibromas present, positive family history of NF1; PDX was not established until PMID:37246765
